title: OpeNLogin
description: OpenLogin is an authentication system focused on being practical, secure and friendly for your players.​
body:
**OpenLogin** is an authentication system focused on being practical, secure and friendly for your players. **Why OpenLogin?** There are several login plugins on the internet. However, not all of these plugins offer a friendly interface for their players. **Translation:** 1. Install the plugin on plugins folder.
2. Change the setting 'languageFile' (config.yml) to the selected language file.
3. Perform the command '/openlogin reload' and start edit with custom `config.yml` file. ```yml # Language of the plugin: languageFile: 'messages_en.yml' ``` More information about translations available here **Support:** Do you have a problem with the plugin? Contact our support via Discord to help you. **Ideas and Bugs:** Do you have a very good idea to implement for OpeNLogin? Send us a suggestion by the Discord group or open an issue at GitHub. (arts and banners made by @youfish30gamer)
